reasoning: Addressing your lactate clearance limiter is essential to enhancing your 5-20 minute power difference. Your last ride indicates you're in a recovery phase. This workout prepares you for Alpine Loop by building fatigue resistance, crucial for maintaining your target power on the climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Alternate 4 minutes at 218W, 3 minutes at 242W, repeated 5 times

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
